channel.title: Tea Latte on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Tea Latte on Barista At Home

item.title: Chai Latte Recipe: How to Make It at Home (3 Ways + Dirty Chai)
item.description: Make a better chai latte at home than anything Starbucks serves. Three methods: from-scratch spice blend, concentrate shortcut, and tea bag. Includes dirty chai with espresso.

item.title: London Fog Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced) — Earl Grey Tea Latte
item.description: Make a London Fog Latte at home — the creamy Earl Grey tea latte with vanilla and steamed milk. Includes Starbucks copycat ratios and an iced version.
